description: An elderly passenger calls to add a wheelchair assistance request to their existing booking.

nodes.task_description: Add the Special Service Request (SSR) code for wheelchair assistance to the booking.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds the correct SSR code (WCHR) to the booking.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the passenger that the request has been added and explain how to get the assistance at the airport.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the request and provides helpful information.
